site.name: Space Heard Us
site.description: We are a youth nonprofit band on a mission to spread joy through music and support those in need.

home.heroSubtitle: Space Heard Us is a youth nonprofit band dedicated to using music as a force for good — performing for communities, raising awareness, and inspiring change.
home.missionText: We believe music has the power to heal, connect, and transform. Through performances and community events, we bring joy to those who need it most and raise awareness for causes close to our hearts.

players.name: Courtney Lee
players.bio: Courtney is the heart and soul of Space Heard Us. As our leader and violinist, she brings passion, precision, and warmth to every performance. Her dedication to the band's mission of using music for good inspires everyone around her.

players.name: Kaden Joo
players.bio: Kaden's piano melodies are the backbone of our sound. With a natural gift for harmony and rhythm, he brings an emotional depth to every song that resonates deeply with our audiences.

players.name: Eric Kim
players.bio: Eric's powerful voice and energetic percussion bring the band to life on stage. His enthusiasm and commitment to every performance make him an unforgettable presence wherever Space Heard Us plays.

events.pageSubtitle: Watch us in action and join us at our next event
